things.name: Mount Etna
things.description: Europe's highest and most active volcano, reachable by cable car from Catania

things.name: Piazza del Duomo
things.description: Baroque square with the Fontana dell'Elefante and stunning cathedral facade

things.name: Catania Cathedral
things.description: Baroque cathedral built over Roman ruins with the relics of patron St Agatha

things.name: La Pescheria Fish Market
things.description: Vibrant early morning fish market in the historic centre, a sensory explosion

things.name: Roman Amphitheatre
things.description: Partially excavated 2nd-century amphitheatre on Piazza Stesicoro

things.name: Ursino Castle
things.description: 13th-century Hohenstaufen castle housing the Civic Museum collections

things.name: Via Etnea
things.description: Long basalt lava-stone boulevard stretching from the cathedral towards Etna

things.name: Villa Bellini
things.description: Beloved city park with fountain and busts of Sicilian celebrities

things.name: Teatro Massimo Bellini
things.description: Ornate opera house honouring composer Vincenzo Bellini, born in Catania

things.name: Valle dell'Alcantara
things.description: Spectacular basalt gorges carved by the Alcantara river, great for swimming
